data.essence: The visual language of a balanced meal, not a diet app. Warm, calm, honest, unobtrusive — a competent friend who has your food handled.

design_principles.detail: Generous cream space, one action per screen, quiet motion. Rasa never nags or shouts macros.
Real portions, real prices, estimates labelled as estimates. Nothing is dressed up to look better than the food that arrives.
Spice-warm palette, rounded plate/bowl shapes, humanist type. Health reads as everyday balance, not a lab report.
The one-tap confirm is the visual climax of every flow — tomato accent, clear number, clear time. Nothing is spent silently.

design_principles.principle: Numbers you can trust at a glance
design_principles.detail: Tabular figures, aligned columns, a visible spend ledger. The maths is always in view.

shape_language.core: Soft rounded rectangles and full circles echoing plates, bowls and the tap target.

texture_and_surface.surfaces: Matte, flat, warm cream. No gradients on brand surfaces, no gloss, no fake depth.
texture_and_surface.grain: At most a very subtle warm paper grain on large backgrounds; never over content.
texture_and_surface.shadows: Soft, low, warm-tinted (never grey-blue). Elevation is gentle — a card lifting a few millimetres, not floating.

pattern.primary_pattern: A light repeating motif of small bowls and spice dots ('the spice-dot field') in Oat on Cream.
pattern.usage: Quiet background texture on empty states, email headers, splash — never behind body text or numbers.

layout_system.grid: 4px base spacing unit; 8px rhythm; mobile-first single column; 12-col on marketing web.
layout_system.density: Airy. One primary decision per screen: the plan, the meal, the confirm.
layout_system.cards: Cream/ivory cards on cream background separated by soft shadow and hairline, not heavy borders.
layout_system.data_blocks: Macro and price blocks are visually grouped, right-aligned figures, tabular.
layout_system.hierarchy: Header (General Sans) → supporting body (Inter) → figures (tabular) → estimate caption (Kettle Slate).

motion_principles.character: Gentle, purposeful, brief. Motion confirms, it never performs.

signature_moments.motion: Meal cards settle in softly, top to bottom, like dishes being laid on a table.
The tomato button gives a single calm press-and-settle; a soft check draws in on success. No bounce, no confetti.
The spend bar eases to its new value in green; the number counts up in tabular figures.

avoid: anything that makes a spend feel like a game

iconography_direction.style: Line-and-fill, rounded, friendly, geometric — never cartoonish.

photography_direction.summary: Real, warm, top-down and close-up food on cream or wood; natural light; honest portions; everyday Indian home and desk contexts.

do: Lead with cream and negative space.
Use the tomato accent only for the confirm/action moment.
Show real food and real numbers.
Label every nutrition figure as an estimate.
dont: Don't use diet-app red/green scold cues or 'good food / bad food' framing.
Don't gamify spending or celebrate ordering with confetti.
Don't use glossy fast-food or staged studio-kitchen imagery.
Don't crowd screens; one decision at a time.
Don't imply medical or 'doctor-approved' benefit anywhere in the visuals.
